title: scrophularia henryi
intro: Scrophularia henryi, also known as Henry's figwort, is a perennial plant species belonging to the figwort family (Scrophulariaceae). The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Scrophularia henryi include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and protect against oxidative stress. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant's roots and leaves are often used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
